author: Brandon Bachmeier
name: Flicker Test
description: Diagnostic 5-cell bisect grid (phase 4). T1: pure CSS spin (control). T2: bg-image URL swap @ 1.5s on a div with blur(40px)+brightness+saturate+scale(1.2) — exactly mimics production .art-bg. T3: backdrop-filter over moving content. T4: plain URL swap @ 1.5s (no filter, control). T5: bg-image URL swap on a div with box-shadow + border-radius — exactly mimics production foreground .art. T5 isolates whether bg-image swap with shadow rendering is the trigger we missed in T4.
